---
agent: agent
---
Translate the current selection (or if none is selected, the entire document) into English.
Then update the corresponding english document or part of document. Do not create a new document if there is one, but try to find the corresponding english document inside 'i18n/en/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/current/' recursively.
To find the corresponding english document you can usually follow this convention: If the german document is here 'docs/', then the the english is here: 'i18n/en/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/current/'
